study.title: Finance close workflow discovery
study.outcome: Reduce time-to-close from 14 days to 5 days

qa.question: Walk me through your last month-end close.
qa.answer: I started on the 28th. Pulled the bank feed Wednesday afternoon. Two transactions came in as duplicates from the prior period, so I spent four hours re-keying the ledger. By Friday I still wasn't sure the numbers reconciled.

qa.question: What did you do when you saw the duplicates?
qa.answer: Exported everything to Excel and rebuilt the matches by hand. The automation flagged a conflict but didn't tell me which rule produced the match, so I couldn't trust it.

qa.question: How do you verify automated matches?
qa.answer: I check every single one for the first three weeks of a new integration. Then I sample. I'd love to trust it sooner, but I can't see why the system made each decision.

qa.question: Tell me about a time the close went smoothly.
qa.answer: Last quarter we had no integration changes. Took 6 days end-to-end. The slow part is always reconciling exceptions when the rules change underneath us.
